summary: Decent audience recording of the late third set – ragged sound with level fluctuations but strong crowd energy.
review: The tape captures a late‑show Set III with the characteristic lo‑fi charm of early ’70s audience recordings. While listeners appreciate the raw vibe and good crowd response, the source suffers from noticeable cuts and uneven volume levels that limit its clarity.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rating review; shows a middling performance (no specific musical praise) and a fair but flawed audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Many cuts, fluctuating sound levels, ragged overall fidelity typical of the era; crowd energy is audible.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Third set of a late show, described as ragged but with good audience enthusiasm; no specific song highlights noted.
